node.goal: Build deterministic end-to-end survey gate-chain fixture proving source_quality, argument_density, controversy_matrix, exploration_log degradation/visibility, GateReport aggregation, and CLI view propagation.
acceptance: Fixture contains paper/code/official/benchmark sources and at least one web-generic source
GateReport has exactly source_quality, argument_density, controversy_matrix, exploration_log slots
CLI format output contains source_quality, argument_density, controversy_matrix, exploration_log, and partial_verdicts when exploration gate is absent
No requests/urllib/httpx/openai/anthropic imports are introduced in e2e tests
No random, datetime.now, time.time, uuid.uuid4, @mock.patch, or MagicMock in e2e tests

node.goal: Build negative-control tests proving low-authority source stuffing, missing argument-density dimensions, decorative contradiction matrix, and missing exploration evidence are not silently accepted.
acceptance: Source stuffing fixture produces non-pass verdict or explicit stuffing reason
Argument-density weak section produces absent dimensions or low density issue
Decorative contradiction matrix produces warn/fail visibility
Missing exploration gate remains visible through partial_verdicts, not hidden
No mock-only tests; negative cases use real package-local gate functions

node.goal: Build activation-proof tests for S04 view registry, orchestration status/hint modules, and attach-style runner hook without modifying frozen runtime entrypoints.
acceptance: VIEW_REGISTRY exposes source_quality, argument_density, contradiction_matrix, exploration, gate_report
attach_to_survey_continue registers section_compiled hook on a fake runner and degrades on runner without add_hook
dispatch_gate_hint injects visible gate context without hard failing
activation proof markdown records command, result, and observed surfaces
